_comment_: Distributary-fan delta architecture, driven by DeltaLayer (= prograding multi-generation fluvial engine with DELTA_FAN baseline). Single-channel trunk meanders before bifurcating into distributaries; generations stack vertically with optional progradation. See header of config_full_pv_shoestring.json for the comment-tag convention. NOTE: delta DELTA_FAN baseline differs significantly from the meandering presets — most overrides come from the preset, comments reflect this.

grid._comment_dx_: dx=dy=10m, dz=1m. Distributaries are ~56m wide -> 5-6 cells (W:D=14, depth=4m). Migration step ~3m -> 0.3 cells/event. 8 generations x 4m channel depth fills 32m vertically; widen z_len if you bump n_generations or mCHdepth.

trunk_length_fraction._comment_: VARIED. Fraction of proximal streamline nodes protected from avulsion (i.e. trunk length before fan branches). DELTA_FAN baseline 0.4. 0.2 = early bifurcation (broad fan), 0.6 = long trunk.

progradation_fraction._comment_: VARIED. Per-generation trunk-length advance (apex moves toward +flow as levels stack). DELTA_FAN baseline 0.0 (no progradation). >0 gives clinoform signature.

n_generations._comment_: AUTO. n_generations = clip(50 / mCHdepth, 2, 12). Deeper trunks stack fewer generations.

mFFCHprop._comment_: VARIED. Fraction of abandoned distributary filled with mud. DELTA_FAN baseline 0.0 (sand-rich tails — visible distributary ribbons). >0 begins to mute the distributaries.

mouth_bar_length_factor._comment_: skip — class default. Bar along-axis length / channel-width.

mouth_bar_width_factor._comment_: skip — class default. Bar peak half-width / channel-width.

mouth_bar_hw_ratio._comment_: skip — class default. Bar thickness above channel / width.

mouth_bar_dw_ratio._comment_: skip — class default. Bar scour-depth below channel / width.

probAvulOutside._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 0.10 -> 0.0 (no out-of-belt avulsions in delta — trunks always start at boundary).

stdevCHsinu._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 0.15 -> 0.02 (tight sinuosity distribution).

stdevCHdepth._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 0.4 -> 0.5.

stdevCHwdratio._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 1.0 -> 2.0.

mCHdepth._comment_: VARIED. Channel depth (m). Range [3, 10] keeps deep stacks below half of z_len so several levels still fit (nlevel auto-tunes inversely).

stdevCHsource._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 80 -> 0.2 (tight, dead-centre feeder source — single trunk entry).

stdevCHazi._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 1.0 -> 0.2.

stdevdistMigrate._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 10 -> 1.

mNeckFFCHprop._comment_: skip — class default. Neck-cutoff plug only used by MEANDER_OXBOW.

mLVdepth._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 1.0 -> 0.5 (small natural levees on distributaries).

stdevLVdepth._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 0.2 -> 0.1.

mLVwidth._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 40 -> 20.

mLVheight._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 0.5 -> 0.3.

mLVasym._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 0.3 -> 0.0 (symmetric levees).

stdevCSnum._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 0.5 -> 0.

Cf._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 0.0078 -> 0.0036.

scour_factor._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 2.0 -> 10.0.
